zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve Bulmer於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾維爾頓時，她的父親Ralph de Bulmer I12歲，母親Alice de Killingthorpe42歲。她和John Fauconberg至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1349年之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve Bulmer于大约1295年出生在英国英格兰越可爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Bulmer I12岁，母亲Alice de Killingthorpe42岁。她和John Fauconberg至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1349年之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

en.lifeSummary: When Eve Bulmer was born about 1295, in Wilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Bulmer I, was 12 and her mother, Alice de Killingthorpe, was 42. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with John Fauconberg. She died before 1349, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve Bulmer est née environ 1295, à Wilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Bulmer I, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alice de Killingthorpe, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec John Fauconberg. Elle est décédée avant 1349, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve Bulmer um 1295 in Wilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Bulmer I 12 und ihre Mutter Alice de Killingthorpe 42. Sie hatte mit John Fauconberg mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1349 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve Bulmer è nata il circa 1295 nel Wilton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph de Bulmer I, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Alice de Killingthorpe, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con John Fauconberg. Morì prima del 1349, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve Bulmerが約1295年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Bulmer Iは12歳，母Alice de Killingthorpeは42歳であった。彼女はJohn Fauconbergとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1349年以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve Bulmer(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Bulmer I(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Killingthorpe(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 John Fauconberg(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve Bulmer nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Wilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Bulmer I, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Killingthorpe, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com John Fauconberg. Ela faleceu antes 1349, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve Bulmer родилась около 1295 г. в местности уилтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph de Bulmer I было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Killingthorpe, 42. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от John Fauconberg. Она умерла перед 1349 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eve Bulmer nació aproximadamente 1295, en Wilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Bulmer I, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Alice de Killingthorpe, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con John Fauconberg. Murió antes de 1349, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
